steps.title: Match appearance to self-importance
steps.content: The claim asks for a quotation in which Johnson's appearance conveys an exaggerated sense of his own importance. A description of how he carries himself like someone passing under a triumphal arch directly connects physical bearing with grand self-regard.

steps.title: Reject weak appearance details
steps.content: Choice B describes clothing but not an exaggerated sense of importance. Choice C sets the scene and mentions his suit without showing self-regard. Choice D describes his tone of voice, not his appearance. The answer is A.
